01001100000111111101010110 - ASI: 16

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 0 * 01
  0110 = 01 * 10
  1101 = 11 * 01
  1111 = 11 * 11
  00001 = 00 * 001
  01001 = 01 * 001
  010110 = 01 * 0110
  1000001 = 10 * 00001
  11111101 = 1111 * 1101
  010011000001 = 01001 * 1000001
  11111101010110 = 11111101 * 010110
  01001100000111111101010110 = 010011000001 * 11111101010110
